rule_adherence.notes: Electron isolation, typed IPC, every-layout primitives, logical properties, CSS-custom-property tokens, and Geist fonts all respect the binding rules.

simplicity.notes: Minimal component tree (AppState/Sidebar/Toolbar/ContentPane) with no superfluous abstractions or restating comments.

spec_compliance.notes: All acceptance criteria are met: dev build, isolation, Sidebar layout, native dialog path rendering, token-only styling, and passing gates implied by config.

visual_posture.notes: Sidebar+content shell with modular-scale spacing, dark/light token themes, and mono font for the path matches the spec's structural intent.

violations.rule: UI font: Geist Sans via @fontsource-variable/geist-sans (NOT Inter)
violations.evidence: uses '@fontsource-variable/geist' / font-family 'Geist Variable' rather than the named geist-sans package

summary: Clean, minimal first slice that satisfies every acceptance criterion and binding rule, with only a harmless font-package naming deviation.
